reason: Commit 11831c0 is a pure editorial condensing pass on already-published v5.0.2-beta.21 release-note bullets. All features mentioned (editPlaceholder/editCommentPlaceholder/editReplyPlaceholder props, VeltCommentDialogComposerAttachmentsImageDownload/OtherDownload primitives, velt-confirm-dialog--comment/--reply CSS classes via ComponentConfig.type, Rewriter askAi/gpt-5.4 migration, and bug fixes) were present in the file before this commit. The diff removes only verbose detail text and HTML web-component attribute aliases from prose — no new API surface was introduced. Per no-op policy, no skill deltas are produced.
